before.description: A.NET Standard wrapper for FFmpeg, enabling developers to compose and execute FFmpeg commands in C# with a fluent interface.

after.description: A .NET Standard wrapper for FFmpeg, enabling developers to compose and execute FFmpeg commands in C# with a fluent interface.

before.description: encoder with hls output based on gstreamer.

after.description: encoder with hls output based on GStreamer.

before.description: A set of command lines to debug video streaming files like mp4 (MPEG-4 Part 14), ts (MPEG-2 Part 1), fmp4 in Dash, HLS, or MSS, with or without DRM.

after.description: A set of command lines to debug video streaming files like mp4 (MPEG-4 Part 14), ts (MPEG-2 Part 1), fmp4 in DASH, HLS, or MSS, with or without DRM.

before.description: Highly extensible, modern, JavaScript video player. Handles MPEG-Dash / HLS / MPEG-4 and is built on top of the HTML5 video element.

after.description: Highly extensible, modern, JavaScript video player. Handles MPEG-DASH / HLS / MPEG-4 and is built on top of the HTML5 video element.
